overview: NexusAI is a modern AI-themed lead generation website with a dark/deep space color palette, neon accent colors, and heavy animations throughout. Features a glassmorphic header, animated hero slider, About Us with animated stat counters, Partners marquee, Exclusive Offers grid, Why Choose Us with Publisher/Advertiser toggle, and a full-featured footer.
features: Glassmorphism sticky header with scroll shrink animation
Auto-rotating hero slider with 3 slides, particle background, and typewriter effects
About Us section with animated stat counters and Lucide icons
Partners infinite-scroll marquee with hover glow/lift effects
Exclusive Offers grid with hover animations and badge labels
Why Choose Us with Publisher/Advertiser toggle tabs
Dark footer with animated gradient border, social icons, and Back to Top
Neon glow effects with electric blue, purple, and cyan palette
